description: Refactor the failing integration test in the 'PaymentSystem' project (~/eclipse-workspace/PaymentSystem) into a unit test using Mockito. The current test in src/test/java/com/example/payment/OrderServiceTest.java fails because it instantiates StripePaymentProcessor, which attempts a real network connection. Refactor this test to mock the PaymentProcessor interface, configuring the mock to return true when processPayment is called, and ensure the test passes without the real implementation.
